board_csa_architect.notes: Clean 6-tier RBAC extends existing app.current_org_id pattern with app.current_privilege_tier. No architectural surprises. Correctly builds on REQ-SEC-10 + REQ-L6-28.

board_ciso_cybersecurity.notes: Defense-in-depth: RLS hard floor prevents any bypass including hallucinating agents. Anti-AC explicitly blocks content columns for Tier 0B and billing for Tier 2. No custom roles prevents privilege escalation attack surface.

board_caio_fullstack.notes: Steering vector integration is well-scoped. 5 tier vectors using existing trigger_keywords pattern from REQ-L6-28. No new model requirements.

board_vp_ops_devops.notes: Migration is additive (ENUM + column). No breaking changes to existing RLS. Middleware is a wrapper, not a replacement. Rollback is safe.

board_red_team.notes: Conditions: (1) Column-level security for Tier 0B metadata-only access needs careful implementation — RLS alone cannot restrict columns, recommend VIEW-based approach or application-layer column filtering verified by tests. (2) Tier promotion from Tier 2 to Tier 1 must require MFA confirmation and audit log. (3) Session variable app.current_privilege_tier must be validated against ENUM — reject unknown values.
